tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                              [ch]Fm[/ch]
Tell me what you want, what you like, it's okay[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]
I'm a little curious too[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                             [ch]Fm[/ch]
Tell me if it's wrong, if it's right, I don't care[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                            [ch]Bb[/ch]
I can keep a secret could you?[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Ab[/ch]                         [ch]Fm[/ch]
Got my mind on your body and your body on my mind[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Cm[/ch]                                         [ch]Bb[/ch]
Got a taste for the cherry I just need to take a bite[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                       [ch]Fm[/ch]
  Don't tell your mother,  kiss one another[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                         [ch]Bb[/ch]
  Die for eachother, we're cool for the summer[/tab]

LINK
[ch]Cm[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch] 
  Take me down  into your paradise[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                                [ch]Bb[/ch]
   Don't be scared cause I'm your body type[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]     [ch]Fm[/ch]
  Just something that we wanna try[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
  Cause you and I, we're cool for the summer[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                     [ch]Fm[/ch]
Tell me if I won, if I did, what's my prize?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                            [ch]Bb[/ch]
I just wanna play with you too[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                          [ch]Fm[/ch]
Even if they judge, fuck it all, do the time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                               [ch]Bb[/ch]
I just wanna have some fun  with you[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Ab[/ch]                         [ch]Fm[/ch]
Got my mind on your body and your body on my mind[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Cm[/ch]                                         [ch]Bb[/ch]
Got a taste for the cherry I just need to take a bite[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                       [ch]Fm[/ch]
  Don't tell your mother,  kiss one another[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]
  Die for each other, we're cool for the summer[/tab]

[ch]Cm[/ch]

[Chorus]

     We're cool for the summer[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]    [ch]Fm[/ch]                     [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
Shhh, don't tell your mother[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Ab[/ch]                         [ch]Fm[/ch]              [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
Got my mind on your body and your body on my mind[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Ab[/ch]                          [ch]Fm[/ch]                  [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]     [ch]Fm[/ch]

[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]
(Take me down)  We're cool for the summer[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Cm[/ch]                              [ch]Bb[/ch]
(Don't be scared) Cause I'm your body type[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]     [ch]Fm[/ch]
